description: A designed single-subject 'DETAINED' card in ICE Denver's standard template: medium-blue background with faint topographic-line texture. The centered square photograph is a candid/intake-style outdoor portrait of a middle-aged man with short dark hair and a mustache, wearing a gray button-up work shirt, standing in a fenced lot with trees behind him. A bold red banner across the bottom of the photo reads 'DETAINED' in large white all-caps. Below, large white serif type gives the name 'Tomas Arana-Fuentes', followed by smaller white text 'PENDING CHARGES FOR SEXUAL ASSAULT ON A HELPLESS VICTIM, NON-CONSENSUAL SEXUAL ASSAULT, AND SEXUAL ASSAULT AGAINST A VICTIM OF INCAPABLE OF APPRAISING CONDITION' (offense phrases bolded; note the awkward phrasing 'VICTIM OF INCAPABLE' appears on the image as printed). Beneath, spaced-out faint capitals read 'DENVER', with the DHS seal and 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' wordmark at the bottom. The technique personalizes a single arrest with multiple severe sexual-assault charges to dramatize the danger of 'criminal aliens'; the tweet adds taunting language ('now HE'S the one feeling helpless'). Target audience: general public and enforcement supporters.
notable_text: DETAINED; Tomas Arana-Fuentes; PENDING CHARGES FOR SEXUAL ASSAULT ON A HELPLESS VICTIM, NON-CONSENSUAL SEXUAL ASSAULT, AND SEXUAL ASSAULT AGAINST A VICTIM OF INCAPABLE OF APPRAISING CONDITION; DENVER
